invoice_number.description: Unique identifier assigned by the supplier to this invoice. Used for referencing, payment, and reconciliation. Every invoice must have one.

supplier_name.description: Legal name of the entity issuing the invoice — the seller, vendor, or service provider. Appears on the invoice as the party requesting payment.

buyer_name.description: Legal name of the entity receiving the invoice — the buyer, customer, or client. The party obligated to make payment.

issue_date.description: The date the invoice was created and issued by the supplier. Determines when the payment clock starts. Distinct from due date.

due_date.description: The date by which payment must be received by the supplier. Late payment may incur penalties. Determined by payment terms relative to issue date.

total_amount.description: The final amount owed by the buyer to the supplier for this entire invoice, typically inclusive of VAT. This is the amount that will be paid. Every invoice must have one.

currency.description: The currency in which all amounts on this invoice are denominated. Typically a 3-letter ISO 4217 code such as CZK, EUR, USD.

payment_details.description: Banking or payment information needed to execute the payment — typically IBAN, account number, bank name, or payment reference. Used to verify payment routing matches the contract.

description.description: Human-readable description of the specific product or service being charged on this line item. Used for contract matching and anomaly detection. Every line item must have one.

quantity.description: The number of units of the product or service delivered. Combined with unit price to derive the line item net amount. May be expressed in hours, pieces, kilograms, or other units.

unit_price.description: The price charged per single unit of the product or service, excluding VAT. Multiplied by quantity to produce the net amount.

amount_net.description: The line item amount before VAT is applied. Equal to quantity multiplied by unit price. Represents the taxable base for this line.

amount_gross.description: The line item amount after VAT is applied. This is what the buyer actually pays for this line. Equal to net amount plus VAT. Every line item must have one.

vat_rate.description: The percentage rate of value-added tax applied to this line item. Varies by product type and country — some goods are zero-rated or exempt. Applied to net amount to produce the VAT portion.
